name: Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1 In a heavy-duty 4-quart saucepan, mix together the sugar and cream.
2 Bring to a rolling boil, then reduce heat and cook until it reaches a firm ball stage (238°F). This may take about half an hour; do not get impatient.
3 In a large mixing bowl, combine the chocolate pieces, chips, or broken bars with butter cut into pieces.
4 Carefully pour the hot mixture over the chocolate contents.
5 Beat the mixture to a smooth consistency using a hand-held electric beater, increasing speed until desired.
6 Pour the mixture into a 9 x 15 inch cake pan that has been lightly buttered and chill.
7 Once set, cut into desired pieces or roll into balls for dipping in dipping chocolate, rolling in nuts, coconut, powdered chocolate, etc.
8 Chill and serve (makes about 5 pounds).
Ideas and suggestions: Use your favorite Hershey bar, such as cookies and cream or milk chocolate with almonds. Mix half white and half brown sugar for added flavor. Add fruit, jello, peanut butter, or marshmallows to create unique variations; however, do not add them too soon or they may float to the surface. Have fun experimenting and trying different combinations.
